items.docs: GET the root of the HTTP interface; returns 'Ok.' when the cluster is reachable.

body.data:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS default.articles
(
    id UInt64,
    title String,
    content_vector Array(Float32),
    CONSTRAINT cons_vec_len CHECK length(content_vector) = 768,
    VECTOR INDEX article_idx content_vector TYPE HNSWFLAT('metric_type=Cosine')
)
ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id

items.docs: Execute DDL over the ClickHouse HTTP interface to create a table with a VECTOR INDEX.
Insert data by sending an INSERT ... FORMAT statement; the rows go in the request body.

body.data:
SELECT id, title, distance(content_vector, [0.1, 0.2, 0.3]) AS dist
FROM default.articles
ORDER BY dist ASC
LIMIT 10

items.docs: Run a vector similarity search in SQL using the distance() function ordered by distance.
